description: Evaluates code management maturity—service governance, code management platform and lifecycle, enterprise repositories and secure storage, repository access control, and testing environment lifecycle.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A code management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Regular code management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: Code management platform and lifecycle
capabilities.description: Code management software and a formalized lifecycle process govern publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code via automated CI/CD and are reviewed at least quarterly.
evaluation_focus: Code management software for publishing, versioning, updating, and deleting code
Formalized documented code lifecycle management process
Automated code management with CI/CD pipelines

capabilities.name: Enterprise code repositories and secure storage
capabilities.description: All enterprise application code is stored securely in enterprise repositories, scanned frequently, and integrated with vulnerability management.
evaluation_focus: All enterprise application code in secure repositories
Secure storage for all code in repositories
Frequent repository scanning integrated with vulnerability management

capabilities.name: Repository access control
capabilities.description: Access to code repositories is limited by function, controlled by CI/CD across repositories and staging locations, and reviewed at least quarterly to prevent privilege creep.
evaluation_focus: Function-based access limits for all code repositories
CI/CD controls access to repositories and staging locations
Regular repository access review to prevent privilege creep

capabilities.name: Testing environment lifecycle
capabilities.description: Processes provision and deprovision code testing environments for creation, testing, deletion, and production movement across all applications, automated via CI/CD.
evaluation_focus: Process to provision code testing environments
Process to deprovision code testing environments after deletion or production movement
Testing environment lifecycle for all applications
Automated provisioning and deprovisioning via CI/CD

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
